title: Xtra Springy Irish Brie Gratin
description: A rich and creamy Irish gratin featuring brie cheese and a mirepoix base, perfect for a flexitarian dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced carrots, onions, and celery, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked vegetables, diced potatoes, vegetable broth, thyme, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Butter six ramekins and fill each with the vegetable mixture.
Top each ramekin with a slice of softened brie cheese.
Place the ramekins on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the gratins from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the gratins hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
